solutions.solution: Let us draw the family diagram from the given information as follows. Now, it is clear that the lady is the sister of man's father-in-law.

According to Yuvraj, the only daughter of my sister's maternal grandmother means Yuvraj's mother and man in photograph is the only brother of Yuvraj's mother. So, man in photograph is the maternal uncle of Yuvraj. Similarly, another man in photograph is the maternal uncle of Sourav. Again, it is given that among the two photographs, one was either of Sourav or Yuvraj and the photograph towards which Yuvraj was pointing was not of Sourav, then that towards which Sourav was pointing is definitely of Yuvraj. Hence, Yuvraj is maternal uncle of Sourav.
